codeReview.summary: The feature adds localStorage-backed caching to TodaysPrompt and keeps refresh behavior fetching a new prompt. Dependency state also matches the expected end state (no @anthropic-ai/sdk or @insforge/nextjs in package.json), with one non-blocking implementation mismatch in cache-key strategy.

issues.description: Requirement asked to store the cached prompt using today's date as the key. Implementation uses a fixed key (`dispatch_todays_prompt`) and stores date inside the value (lines 6, 33-34), which still works functionally but does not follow the requested keying strategy exactly.

sharedStateObservations.observation: fullstack-worker requires agent-browser for UI changes, but this UI component feature was verified only via build/lint and code checks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill requirement in .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md:23 and manual verification step at lines 50-55; transcript skeleton for worker session c4d27095-d7d4-4b27-bbf9-60d3fec74ac6 contains no agent-browser invocation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker used a project init command that is not documented in services/commands shared state.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton includes Execute: `bash .factory/init.sh`; .factory/services.yaml documents install/build/lint/dev/typecheck commands only.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Dependency notes in shared library are stale relative to current package state.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/environment.md lines 39-40 still say @anthropic-ai/sdk and @insforge/nextjs were listed but unused, while current package.json dependencies (lines 11-24) no longer include either package.

summary: Reviewed feature fix-todays-prompt-caching-and-deps for worker session c4d27095-d7d4-4b27-bbf9-60d3fec74ac6 (commit 7266a86). Implementation satisfies expected runtime behavior for dashboard prompt caching and dependency end state, with one non-blocking mismatch from the requested cache-key format.
